top_signals.title: China is helping to cushion global oil prices below $100 — but analysts warn it won’t last
top_signals.summary: China has reduced oil imports since the start of the Iran war, capping global crude prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Stocks Halt Rout Even as Iran Tensions Lift Oil: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: US stocks futures staged a rebound even as tensions in the Middle East sent oil prices higher.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wall Street set for gains after AI-led rout
top_signals.summary: US stocks poised to rebound from Friday rout that rattled global markets
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Nationwide boss Debbie Crosbie banks £4.7m payday after Virgin Money deal
top_signals.summary: The boss of Nationwide has seen her pay almost double since the building society’s blockbuster takeover of Virgin Money. Debbie Crosbie, who has steered the mutual since 2022, bagged a £4.7m pay packet in the last financial year, up from £2.5m the year prior.
